programme.title: Call the Midwife 14
programme.desc: The fourteenth season of the series inspired by the memories of Jennifer Worth.1970. Nuns and midwives from Nonnatus House continue to support the inhabitants of the poor East End, where terrible living conditions and infectious diseases take their toll.Growing protests on the Isle of Dogs further complicate their daily work.The team faces exceptionally difficult challenges: a mysterious teenage pregnancy, a case of bipolar disorder, a gonorrhea infection and a dramatic childbirth, which put their knowledge and empathy to the test.

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: Another adventures of the Jessop family, whose everyday life is full of mishaps, misunderstandings and plot twists.The characters face challenges and their lives become complicated in the least expected moments.

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: Another adventures of the Jessop family, whose everyday life is full of mishaps, misunderstandings and plot twists.The characters face challenges and their lives become complicated in the least expected moments.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: A student from a local correctional facility is found dead.Dr. Lucien Blake is the first suspect in this case.The man begins to amaze the police with his investigative methods.

credits.actor: Chief Supt Matthew Lawson - Joel Tobeck
Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry
Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry

programme.title: Lewis 6
programme.desc: The adventures of Detective Lewis (Kevin Whately) and Sergeant Hathaway (Laurence Fox), who work together and try to solve the most complex crime mysteries.

credits.actor: Chief Superintendent Jean Innocent - Rebecca Front

programme.title: Father Brown 8
programme.desc: A priest starts an investigation into the unusual death of an eccentric beekeeper.He also discovers a conspiracy related to an art exhibition.He also tries to prove the innocence of a woman accused of murder.

programme.title: Death in Paradise 15
programme.desc: Detective Mervin Wilson (Don Gilet) returns to the charming island of Saint Marie - a tropical corner of the Caribbean full of sun, which, however, hides numerous secrets beneath its idyllic surface.The investigator is still trying to find his place here.He is also taking on further criminal cases.He investigates, among other things, the circumstances of the poisoning of a local newspaper reporter, the alleged attack of a legendary beast on a lecturer, and the death of a professional killer.Additionally, he intervenes when the body of a couples therapist is found on the beach of a luxury resort.Additionally, an unexpected meeting with his stepbrother draws him into a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: A student from a local correctional facility is found dead.Dr. Lucien Blake is the first suspect in this case.The man begins to amaze the police with his investigative methods.

credits.actor: Chief Supt Matthew Lawson - Joel Tobeck

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A detective in a cassock, Father Brown (Mark Williams), solves each crime in his own unique way.In his work, he uses primarily intuition and psychological knowledge.Due to his profession as a confessor, he is best able to penetrate the soul of a criminal.He leaves the judgment to God and tries to lead every sinner to the right path.The series based on the stories of Gilbert Keith Chesterton will feature humor, sympathy for human weaknesses, and extraordinary twists and turns.

programme.title: Lewis 6
programme.desc: The adventures of Detective Lewis (Kevin Whately) and Sergeant Hathaway (Laurence Fox), who work together and try to solve the most complex crime mysteries.

credits.actor: Chief Superintendent Jean Innocent - Rebecca Front
Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry

programme.title: Midsomer Murders 8
programme.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complex murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the eighth series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

credits.actor: Dan Scott, partner Toma - John Hopkins
Joyce Barnaby, żona Toma - Jane Wymark
Cully Barnaby, córka Toma - Laura Howard

programme.title: Midsomer Murders 8
programme.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complex murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the eighth series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

credits.actor: Dan Scott, partner Toma - John Hopkins
Joyce Barnaby, żona Toma - Jane Wymark
Cully Barnaby, córka Toma - Laura Howard

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Commissioners from a Caribbean island are never bored.Every day they track down dangerous bandits to reduce the crime rate that is spreading here.

programme.title: Death in Paradise 15
programme.desc: Detective Mervin Wilson (Don Gilet) returns to the charming island of Saint Marie - a tropical corner of the Caribbean full of sun, which, however, hides numerous secrets beneath its idyllic surface.The investigator is still trying to find his place here.He is also taking on further criminal cases.He investigates, among other things, the circumstances of the poisoning of a local newspaper reporter, the alleged attack of a legendary beast on a lecturer, and the death of a professional killer.Additionally, he intervenes when the body of a couples therapist is found on the beach of a luxury resort.Additionally, an unexpected meeting with his stepbrother draws him into a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: Maigret Sets a Trap
programme.desc: Paris, 1955. Four women are murdered in the Montmartre district within five months.The perpetrator stabbed each of them to death.The victims include:a prostitute and a midwife, but the killed women have nothing in common except that they were brunettes.French Minister of Justice Morel (Rufus Wright) entrusts the case to Inspector Jules Maigret (Rowan Atkinson).The commissioner decides to set a trap for the serial killer, using policewoman Martha Jusserard (Eva-Jane Willis) as bait.She manages to survive the attacker, and the evidence obtained makes Marcel Moncin (David Dawson) a suspect - a man living with a possessive wife (Rebecca Night) and mother (Fiona Shaw).Maigret arrests him, but while Moncin is in custody, another murder occurs.Another part of the adventures of the hero of the series of crime novels and stories by Georges Simenon.This time the British director Ashley Pearce (series "Dowton Abbey", "Poirot") was behind the camera.Rowan Atkinson (Mr. Bean, Maigret and the Dead, Four Weddings and a Funeral) reprized his role as Inspector Maigret.His partners included, among others:David Dawson ("Peaky Blinders", "The Fall of the Kingdom"), Fiona Shaw ("The Tree of Life", the Harry Potter film series), Lucy Cohu ("The Whispers", "Jane in Love") Rebecca Night ("Wuthering Heights", "Irene Sendler's Children"), Rufus Wright ("45", "Assassin's Creed") and Shaun Dingwall ("Summer in February", miniseries"Survivors").

credits.actor: Chief Inspector Jules Maigret - Rowan Atkinson
Yvonne Moncin, żona Marcela - Rebecca Night
Madame Moncin, matka Marcela - Fiona Shaw

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Commissioners from a Caribbean island are never bored.Every day they track down dangerous bandits to reduce the crime rate that is spreading here.

Cully Barnaby, córka Toma - Laura Howard

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: Seven people who broke the law are ordered to carry out community service to renovate a building in Bristol.Tensions mount within the group, but when a member gets into trouble, the rest unite to help him.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A detective in a cassock, Father Brown (Mark Williams), solves each crime in his own unique way.In his work, he uses primarily intuition and psychological knowledge.Due to his profession as a confessor, he is best able to penetrate the soul of a criminal.He leaves the judgment to God and tries to lead every sinner to the right path.The series based on the stories of Gilbert Keith Chesterton will feature humor, sympathy for human weaknesses, and extraordinary twists and turns.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The further fate of Father Brown, who solves subsequent puzzles using his innate intuition and acquired psychological knowledge.In his work, he uses the experience gained over many years of service.
